mapSpain: Administrative Boundaries of Spain

Source: R/mapSpain-package.R
mapSpain-package.Rd

Administrative Boundaries of Spain at several levels (Autonomous Communities, Provinces, Municipalities) based on the 'GISCO' 'Eurostat' database https://ec.europa.eu/eurostat/web/gisco and 'CartoBase SIANE' from 'Instituto Geografico Nacional' https://www.ign.es/. It also provides a 'leaflet' plugin and the ability of downloading and processing static tiles.

See also

Useful links:

  • https://ropenspain.github.io/mapSpain/

  • https://github.com/rOpenSpain/mapSpain

  • Report bugs at https://github.com/rOpenSpain/mapSpain/issues

On this page

About mapSpain

Developed by Diego Hernangómez.
Part of the rOpenSpain project.

About rOpenSpain

rOpenSpain is a community of enthusiasts of R, open data, and reproducibility that comes together and organizes itself to create R packages of the highest quality for the analysis and use of Spanish data of general interest.

"rOpenSci is our form, Spanish public data our matter"

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.

Template rostemplate by dieghernan, based on Universal Theme for Hugo.
